Hey Bob,

Got it — the new specs look reasonable. I'll review the details tonight and get back to you tomorrow.

Cheers,
Alice

Sent with Proton Mail secure email.

On Tuesday, March 4th, 2026 at 18:42, Bob Builder <bob@example.com> wrote:
Hi Alice,

Attached are the updated technical specs for the next iteration. Key changes:
  • API rate limit increased to 1000 req/min
  • New webhook endpoint for status updates
  • Deprecated legacy v1 endpoints (sunset July 2026)
Let me know if anything is unclear.

Bob
